catalogData.name: Water
properties: Physical Resistance, Acid Immunity, Electricity Vulnerability
Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Infuse Mana
powers.raw: Infuse Mana (Trait): +Force/2 on Illusion spell Drain tests

powers.name: Sustain Spell
powers.raw: Sustain Spell (No Action, Sustained): Sustain one Illusion spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
powers.text: Sustain one Illusion spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

evolvedPowers.name: Banishing Resistance
evolvedPowers.raw: Banishing Resistance (Trait): Double Force vs. Negate

evolvedPowers.name: Dilute Chemicals
evolvedPowers.raw: Dilute Chemicals (Complex Action): Cast Antidote at Force or end ongoing acid damage. Can't target same toxin twice.
evolvedPowers.text: Cast Antidote at Force or end ongoing acid damage. Can't target same toxin twice.

evolvedPowers.name: Refract Light
evolvedPowers.raw: Refract Light (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Trid Phantasm at Force. Only creates 1m still image.
evolvedPowers.text: Cast Trid Phantasm at Force. Only creates 1m still image.

elementalFormulaePower.name: Elemental Formulae
elementalFormulaePower.raw: Elemental Formulae (Complex Action, Sustained): 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
elementalFormulaePower.text: 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

greatFormPowers.name: Engulf
greatFormPowers.raw: Engulf (Trait): When melee attack hits, target is Grabbed and takes (Force)S damage every Combat Turn. Resist: BOD+Armor
greatFormPowers.text: When melee attack hits, target is Grabbed and takes (Force)S damage every Combat Turn. Resist: BOD+Armor

greatFormPowers.name: Slick
greatFormPowers.raw: Slick (Major Action, Sustained): Cast Weaken at Force, can only affect Agility. Range is 30m, but must sustain.
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Weaken at Force, can only affect Agility. Range is 30m, but must sustain.
